extracted_ingredients: Two 28-ounce cans whole tomatoes (see Note above), with their juice
1/2 cup whole milk or heavy cream
Kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper
2 tablespoons chopped fresh herbs, such as parsley, basil, or chives (optional)

schemaorg_recipe.description: NOTE : I like to use high-quality canned tomatoes such as Muir Glen in this soup.
schemaorg_recipe.name: 15-MINUTE PANTRY TOMATO SOUP
recipeIngredient: Two 28-ounce cans whole tomatoes (see Note above), with their juice

Kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper
2 tablespoons chopped fresh herbs, such as parsley, basil, or chives (optional)
